title: DB package
description: The DB package provides classes and interfaces for interacting with databases. It includes the DBWritable interface, which defines methods for writing and reading objects to and from a database, and the OracleDateSplitter class, which implements DBSplitter for date/time values returned by an Oracle database. The classes in this package collaborate to provide a flexible and efficient way to handle database operations in a Hadoop MapReduce job.

raw_response:
TITLE: DB package

DESCRIPTION:
The DB package provides classes and interfaces for interacting with databases. It includes the DBWritable interface, which defines methods for writing and reading objects to and from a database, and the OracleDateSplitter class, which implements DBSplitter for date/time values returned by an Oracle database. The classes in this package collaborate to provide a flexible and efficient way to handle database operations in a Hadoop MapReduce job.
